name: Type 2 Diabetes
description: Chronic condition affecting blood sugar regulation

name: Hypertension
description: Persistently elevated blood pressure in arteries

name: Asthma
description: Chronic inflammatory disease of the airways

name: Chronic Kidney Disease
description: Gradual loss of kidney function over time

name: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
description: Group of diseases causing blocked airflow to the lungs

name: Anemia
description: Lack of healthy red blood cells to carry oxygen

name: Atrial Fibrillation
description: Irregular and often rapid heart rate

name: Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease
description: Stomach acid flows back into the esophagus

name: Depression
description: Persistent low mood and loss of interest

name: Migraine
description: Recurrent severe headaches often with nausea
